data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. I'll filter for the "Integration" category.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` in Directory.Build.props). The tests are categorized as "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests.

With MSTest v3 and the testing platform, filtering by category uses `--filter` with `TestCategory=Integration`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-dee42af255264b9a860a804b0e43c5dc && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MSTest category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter
